detail: The generator now uses explicit None handling for numeric fallbacks and hard-gates missing REG-2 before residual fields.
NO_GO_PENDING_REG2 emits no post-intervention residual field and no admissible residual input.
TERM-owned support is treated as structural no-op; legacy setpoint is not applied as mechanism-2 correction.
The valid-run path rewrites fit cut IDs with an ownership segment before per-cut grouping; no fit is run in this NO-GO packet.
The valid-run path now uses Theil-Sen as the primary within-cut slope and publishes OLS as a descriptor.
The valid-run path computes S_B, S_A, R, S, N, M, Q and selects a single top-down branch.
